billing.title: The Price of
billing.subtitle: Nexus AI is not a tool; it is an instrument of decision. We don't sell code; we sell time, clarity, and the power of immediate insight.

expert.name: SaaS Expert
expert.description: Individual command post for high-value experts.

corporate.name: Corporate
corporate.description: Standardization of analysis intelligence within your critical departments.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: The complete neural operating system for institutions and governments.

billing.early_desc: Be one of the first 100 officers to establish a neural link and lock in our foundation pricing. Exclusivity is a feature, not a choice.
billing.tarifs_desc: Configure your token quotas, activate reusable monthly subscriptions, or simulate secure billing flows via Stripe.

home.hero_subtitle: AuditAX Nexus Hub: The future of operational intelligence, protected by state-of-the-art technology.
home.cognitive_cta: Navigate toward secure processing enclaves and explore our high-density predictive models.
home.cognitive_desc: Our neural engine processes your operational data in real-time. With advanced AI, each analysis becomes a decision lever, not just a report.
home.compliance_desc: Guarantee regulatory compliance and data security with automated audits and continuous round-the-clock monitoring.
home.compliance_page_desc: Real-time visualization and management of sovereign security rules and militarized regulatory frameworks.
home.fleet_desc: Monitor, track and audit all connected devices in real-time. From servers to workstations, every endpoint is accounted for in your sovereign perimeter.
home.fleet_page_desc: Geographic mappings and orbital 3D visualizations of global endpoint security metrics.
home.secops_desc: Centralize your security operations with military-grade tooling. Real-time threat detection, automated response, and forensic audit capabilities.
home.secops_page_desc: Real-time surveillance of active threats, live compliance metrics and incident response tracking.
home.orchestration_desc: Optimize security operations through automated workflow orchestration and incident playbook response actions.
home.ai_desc: Leverage artificial intelligence for proactive threat detection and advanced predictive risk analysis.
home.tactical_desc: Define automated tactical responses to sovereign policy breaches.

diagnostic.diag_verify_secure_firebase_auth_co: Verify secure Firebase Auth connectivity and active session tokens.
diagnostic.diag_if_this_test_fails_make_sure_y: If this test fails, make sure your firebase-applet-config.json configuration is correct.
diagnostic.diag_perform_a_network_handshake_wi: Perform a network handshake with Firestore and measure latency.
diagnostic.diag_ensure_you_are_connected_to_th: Ensure you are connected to the internet and your Firestore security rules for the ai-studio database are deployed.
diagnostic.diag_verify_the_reachability_of_sta: Verify the reachability of stand-alone Express server microservices.
diagnostic.diag_the_backend_server_must_be_sta: The backend server must be started on port 3000. Launch "npm run dev" if running locally.
diagnostic.diag_verify_active_connectivity_of: Verify active connectivity of the WebSocket telemetry stream.
diagnostic.diag_check_the_configuration_of_the: Check the configuration of the nginx reverse proxy or the node server status.
diagnostic.diag_verify_persistent_browser_cach: Verify persistent browser cache storage read/write limits.
diagnostic.diag_free_some_browser_cache_disk_s: Free some browser cache disk space or allow third-party cookies for this domain.
diagnostic.diag_confirm_presence_and_validatio: Confirm presence and validation of secret GEMINI_API_KEY.
diagnostic.diag_add_gemini_api_key_into_your_e: Add GEMINI_API_KEY into your .env file and restart the development server.
